# PostgreSQL Catalog Extraction Expert Skill

This skill covers PostgreSQL catalog extraction, version-gated catalog behavior, ACL parsing,
model mapping into `DbObjects.cs`, and extraction completeness expectations in pgPacTool.

## Use this skill when changing
- `Extract/` code
- extraction queries against `pg_catalog`
- model mapping for extracted objects
- ACL/privilege parsing
- PostgreSQL version validation for extraction
- extraction tests and extraction docs
